title: Ender's Dyed Planks
description: A mod that adds 15 plank color variations for planks, slabs, and stairs.
body:
Bring a splash of color to your builds with this mod, which introduces 15 vibrant variations of dyed wooden planks, stairs, and slabs—all fully craftable in survival mode!
The crafting recipe is similar to the crafting recipe of stained glass. One dye surrounded by eight oak planks, that can be turned into stairs and slabs.
